## Description

<!-- Please describe the changes you made and the problem it solves -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an [x] -->

- [ ] 🚀 Feature (feat: - adds new functionality)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix (fix: - fixes a bug)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (docs: - updates documentation)
- [ ] 🧹 Maintenance (chore: - housekeeping tasks)
- [ ] ✅ Tests (test: - adds or updates tests)
- [ ] 🔨 Refactor (refactor: - code restructuring)
- [ ] 🎨 Style (style: - formatting, no code changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance (perf: - performance improvements)
- [ ] 🌐 CI/CD (ci: - workflow changes)

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] E2E tests pass
- [ ] Tested on Linux
- [ ] Tested on macOS (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested on Windows (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have used conventional commit format for the PR title
